formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Form hard to fault.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 400m bumped with Giles before shifting out away from that gelding.

form.formComment: Last start 5th of 9 at Warrnambool Bm62 on March 26 over 1400m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Ultra Blue with 60kg at $16. The start before that second last of 11 at Terang Bm62 on February 20 over 1406m, 6 len behind Suze Spritz with 58kg at $10. Suited and should be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Most recently 8th of 10 at Terang Bm56 on March 17 over 1206m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Dobkins carrying 60kg at $31. The race before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 0.5 len at Ararat 3yo Mdn-Sw March 3 over 1200m on a rain affected track defeating Aradeo carrying 58kg at $6.50. Rates highly. Can improve on the latest effort and gets his chance.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 46-day let-up. Most recently came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at Terang Bm56 on February 20 over 1606m, 3 len behind She's Impeccable carrying 60kg at $11. The race before that raced on the speed throughout before fading second last of 10 at Colac Bm66 on February 6 over 1600m, 4.5 len behind Cat Noir with 55kg at $61. Well in the mix.
